frictions.description: The restorable Mission session available in the isolated UI was a lightweight foundation validation session rather than the active validator-injected mission, so rich recovery assertions had to be proven with a combination of Electron sanity checks, diagnostics, live missionDir files, and focused automated tests instead of a single all-in-one UI fixture.
frictions.resolution: Used the restored Electron Mission session for real-surface proof of coherent restore/reload, then used /Users/clive/.factory/missions/a340063e-1391-4186-b698-8db9955f8eda plus focused tests for validator-injected, disk-only, completion-gating, and orphan-worker assertions.

frictions.description: The restored foundation metadata session persisted a missionDir path that no longer exists on disk, so that specific session could prove Mission identity restore but not current missionDir reconciliation behavior.
frictions.resolution: Validated missionDir-backed recovery behaviors against the active live mission directory a340063e-1391-4186-b698-8db9955f8eda and the focused recovery tests instead.

frictions.description: The restorable Mission session available in the isolated Electron UI was a previously saved foundation-validation Mission session rather than the active validator-injected mission tied to the live missionDir under /Users/clive/.factory/missions/a340063e-1391-4186-b698-8db9955f8eda.
frictions.resolution: Used the real Electron UI for a Mission-surface coherence sanity check, then validated the assigned recovery assertions with the active live missionDir plus focused passing tests that directly cover capture, fallback, merge, and late-file behavior.

frictions.description: The saved Mission session used for UI sanity proof persisted missionDir metadata for /Users/clive/.factory/missions/a901a190-5925-431e-8657-8db9bb502391, but that specific historical missionDir no longer exists on disk.
frictions.resolution: Used that session only for real-surface coherence proof and relied on the active live missionDir plus focused tests for current disk-backed recovery behavior.
